tasks.label: Train YOLOv5n Live (gpu_tf)
args: source ~/.bashrc >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; source ~/miniconda3/etc/profile.d/conda.sh; conda activate gpu_tf; cd /home/abuntu/Documents/github_Temp/unknown-ship-detection-ai/yolov5; python train.py --img 640 --batch 16 --epochs 50 --data /home/abuntu/Documents/github_Temp/unknown-ship-detection-ai/dataset/dataset.yaml --weights yolov5n.pt --device 0 --workers 4 --project /home/abuntu/Documents/github_Temp/unknown-ship-detection-ai/runs/train --name tau_yolov5n_live --exist-ok
